description: Single-file Python project with two planted defects, licensed (bridge network + QODANA_LICENSE_ONLY_TOKEN via passEnv). First e2e for the Ultimate Python image (conda + node toolchain). Proves qodana-python builds (base + conda + node + dist + cli + runtime), loads the Qodana plugin from the dist custom-plugins, licenses as QDPY, and scans a real .py producing SARIF. Driver name + rule ids pinned from CI run 27876312623.

expectations.reason: The planted `unused = 42` local that is never read surfaces as PyUnusedLocalInspection (pinned from CI run 27876312623; enabled in the default PyCharm Pro profile).
`Greeter.shout` never uses `self`, so PyMethodMayBeStaticInspection reports (pinned from CI run 27876312623).
